# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "3.0"
plugins:
  - name: cors
    global: true
    config:
      origins:
        - http://localhost:8080
        - https://dev.mywebapp.com
        - https://prod.mywebapp.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
      headers:
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization
        - Accept
        - X-Requested-With
        - If-Match
        - If-None-Match
        - If-Modified-Since
        - If-Unmodified-Since
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Custom-Header
        - X-RateLimit-Limit
        - X-RateLimit-Remaining
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      preflight_continue: false

  - name: rate-limiting
    global: true
    config:
      minute: 5000
      policy: local

services:
  - name: my-api-service
    url: http://upstream-service:8000
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          hide_credentials: true
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 1000
          policy: local

  - name: another-api-service
    url: http://another-upstream-service:8001
    plugins:
      - name: jwt
        config:
          claims_to_verify:
            - exp
          secret_is_base64: false
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - https://specific-app.mywebapp.com
            - https://internal-dashboard.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
          headers:
            - Content-Type
            - Authorization
            - X-Internal-Header
          credentials: true
          max_age: 600

routes:
  - name: my-secure-route
    service: my-api-service
    paths:
      - /secure-data
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 10
          policy: local
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          hide_credentials: true
          key_names: [X-Route-API-Key]

  - name: my-public-route
    service: my-api-service
    paths:
      - /public-data
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - "*" # Allow all origins for public access (use with caution)
          methods:
            - GET
          headers:
            - Content-Type
            - X-Public-Header
          credentials: false
          max_age: 1200
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          hour: 500
          policy: local

  - name: my-admin-route
    service: another-api-service
    paths:
      - /admin
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 5
          policy: local
      - name: jwt
        config:
          secret_is_base64: false
          claims_to_verify:
            - exp
            - nbf
            - aud # Example: require specific audience for admin
          maximum_expiration: 3600 # JWT must expire within 1 hour
